vision_report.narrative_description: I have performed a meticulous audit of the provided image sequence. The registry provided (P1-P4) does not match the physical reality of the desk. The pots are essentially empty, containing only soil. The sequence documents the introduction of non-botanical items (spoon, tube) rather than the growth or maintenance of plants. The 'biome' is currently a static, non-vegetated environment.
